query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pp.id) as photo_count FROM properties p LEFT JOIN property_photos pp ON pp.propertyId = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user wPFtpuzcjTMQHQ6.root --database bn23yPpAqDW8FGGWUFqWsM --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pp.id) as photo_count FROM properties p LEFT JOIN property_photos pp ON pp.propertyId = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
